overall.description: First-person exploration through a desert wasteland on the outskirts of a futuristic metropolis. The player walks past an abandoned garage complex and along a highway with sparse vehicle traffic, with the distinctive skyline of Night City visible in the distance. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring industrial structures and desert terrain.

events.description: turns left toward the Dakota garage away from the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path next to highway barriers, turning toward an abandoned garage complex with the city skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the highway in the background

entered.detail: low concrete structure covered in colorful graffiti tags
concrete barriers with red and white stripes separating the dirt path from the asphalt
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible on the horizon
industrial garage building with illuminated blue and orange signage
utility poles with high-tension wires stretching across the desert

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a desert dirt path beside a highway. An abandoned graffiti-covered building sits on the left while red and white barriers line the right. The camera turns toward the Dakota garage complex ahead, with the futuristic city skyline visible in the distance under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned garage complex with scrap yard

events.description: moves from open roadside into the garage compound area with scrap piles

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the Dakota garage, passing metal fences and piles of scrap metal and wrecked vehicles

notable_agents.action: figure in pink clothing standing near the garage entrance

entered.detail: tall vertical sign with illuminated orange GARAGE lettering
large white cylindrical water tank with blue structural base
silver metal barricade fencing surrounding the property
pile of wrecked vehicles and industrial debris

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the Dakota garage complex, passing through a metal fence gate. A tall neon garage sign and large water tower dominate the scene. The ground is scattered with scrap metal and wrecked cars. A few NPCs stand near the garage entrance as the camera moves past the industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert wasteland transitioning to highway

events.description: returns to the highway roadside from the open desert area

agents.ego_description: walking through open desert terrain with sparse vegetation, heading back toward the highway while passing the water tower

entered.detail: blue neon arrow sign mounted on a pole pointing left
metal guardrail along the road edge with wooden posts

segments.scene_description: Leaving the garage complex behind, the camera moves through open desert terrain with dry grass and scattered rocks. The water tower recedes to the left as the view opens up to the highway again. A blue neon arrow sign appears near the roadside as the camera approaches the asphalt.

events.description: black pickup truck and other vehicles pass by on the highway
colorful modified dune buggy with decorations drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the highway watching traffic pass by, with desert mountains and power lines in the background

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving along the highway
blue modified dune buggy with yellow wheels and decorative elements

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cables
brown desert mountains and hills in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the highway through the desert wasteland. Various vehicles including trucks and modified cars pass by on the road. Power pylons line the left side of the frame while desert mountains stretch across the horizon. The city skyline remains visible in the far left distance as the camera continues walking along the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate desert roadside through an industrial garage complex and back out into the open wasteland. It begins by walking along a dirt path beside a highway, passing a graffiti-covered building and red-and-white barriers while the futuristic city skyline looms in the distance. As the camera turns toward the Dakota garage complex, it passes through a metal fence gate into a scrap-filled yard dominated by a tall neon sign and a massive water tower. The scene then shifts away from the industrial structures, moving through dry grass and scattered rocks until a blue neon arrow signals the return to the asphalt. Finally, the camera follows the highway through the desert wasteland, passing modified vehicles and power pylons with the distant mountains and city skyline framing the horizon.
